rationale: Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-919; proactive spec rollout work, driver not doing anything wrong.
CI task restructuring (TypeScript compilation vs type check); internal build/CI improvement, no spec involvement.
Bug + Issue split DRIVERS-2369; driver incorrectly enabled causal consistency in implicit sessions, violating sessions spec.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1707; proactive SDAM spec rollout, not a driver bug.
BSON spec requires -0 to serialize as Double; driver failed to preserve negative zero on round-trip.
Changing for-in to Object.keys for BSON serialization; internal JS behavior change, no specific BSON spec rule about prototype enumeration.
Non-object BSON serialize/deserialize roundtrip fails; depends outward on SPEC-1271 indicating fix required spec amendment.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2490; proactive auth spec rollout removing getNonce for newer servers.
MessageStream not destroyed with Connection; internal resource cleanup bug, no contradicted spec rule.
BSON error class hierarchy inconsistency (BSONError vs BSONTypeError); internal API design, not a spec violation.
Session leak when breaking async cursor iterator mid-stream; implementation resource leak, no specific spec rule violated.
Remove non-spec lastOp/opTime from bulk response; description says 'not a drivers spec feature', cleanup improvement.
Explicitly says 'align with other drivers and send hello: 1'; filed to match other drivers' hello command value.
zstd optional dependency fails in Alpine Docker due to native binary; packaging/platform issue, not spec.
EJSON canonical format truncates double precision to 13 digits; spec change was not intended to change library behavior, driver misapplied it.
React Native bundle exports support for BSON v5; platform/packaging improvement, no spec involvement.
serializeInto inconsistently checks toBSON on Map vs Object; internal JS behavior, no specific BSON spec rule about Map handling.
Large Double.toExtendedJSON() produces '1.7e+308.0' with trailing '.0'; BSON EJSON spec requires valid parseable format, Java throws on this string.
Remove optional argument overload detection logic; internal API cleanup for v5 major, no spec behavior.
Missing TypeScript callback typings for insertOne in mongo-legacy; type definition bug, not spec.
Summary says 'Spec Compliance: BulkWrite result not matching spec expectations'; required CRUD spec fields missing/inaccessible on BulkWriteResult.
Align snappy peer dependency notation to caret; packaging/dependency hygiene, no spec.
createDataKey used deprecated callback API incompatible with driver v5; internal compatibility fix, not a spec rule violation.
Change AbstractCursor async iterator return type to AsyncGenerator; TypeScript type annotation change, no spec behavior.
Cursor.clone returns non-legacy cursor breaking callback style in mongo-legacy wrapper; internal compat wrapper bug.
Move AWS SDK from optional dependency to peerDependencies; packaging decision, no spec involvement.
Mark aws/credentials as optional peer dependency in libmongocrypt bindings; packaging improvement, no spec.
Sessions spec: lsid MUST be sent on all commands except unacknowledged writes; driver incorrectly omits lsid on reads when writeConcern=0.
Issue split DRIVERS-1591; clarify runOn.minServerVersion behavior in spec test runner; test infrastructure concern.
Improvement + Depends DRIVERS-1230; proactive sessions spec rollout on logicalSessionsTimeoutMinutes.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1896; proactive spec rollout for change stream resume server selection clarification.
Add CI variant and ESLint plugin to ensure BigInt not used when useBigInt64=false; internal CI/test infrastructure, not spec behavior.
endSession should abort active transaction; driver returns unhandled promise from abortTransaction, violating transactions spec cleanup requirement.
Memory leak introduced in 4.13.0; implementation regression, no spec rule about memory management.
Closing change stream throws MongoExpiredSessionError after upgrade; internal session lifecycle regression, not a specific spec rule violation.
Docs 404 page missing logo on trailing-slash paths; documentation/website issue, no spec involvement.
EJSON.parse fails to deserialize canonical EJSON Dates when useBigInt64=true; BSON/EJSON spec requires canonical date parsing to round-trip correctly.
ObjectId TypeScript type resolves as 'any' due to missing type definitions in exports conditions; TypeScript tooling bug, not spec.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-1873; proactive wire protocol spec rollout to use OP_MSG for auth.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2377; proactive CSFLE spec rollout for GCP attached service account KMS support.
Forward port of NODE-4999: sessions spec requires lsid on reads; driver omits it when writeConcern=0, causing getMore failure.
Update docs.mongodb.com links in source and docs; documentation link update, Issue split DRIVERS-2249.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2530; proactive sessions spec rollout changing how sessions support is determined.
High reconnection rate from Min Pool Size check logic; implementation/performance bug, no specific CMAP spec rule about reconnection frequency.
Backport of NODE-4854 fix; same implementation/performance bug, no spec rule violation.
Document that ObjectId must be constructed with 'new'; documentation improvement for breaking change, no spec.
X.509 auth error message shows '[object Object]' instead of mechanism name; error message quality issue, not spec compliance.
Improvement + Issue split DRIVERS-2411; proactive CSFLE spec rollout for Azure VM Managed Identity KMS credentials.
Wrong _bsontype string 'ObjectID' vs 'ObjectId' breaks find with ObjectId filter; internal type-check bug, no specific CRUD spec rule about ObjectId-as-filter.
Client metadata platform string duplicated on repeated options parsing; handshake spec (SPEC-579) defines platform field format, driver violates it.
